2025-10-03T15:47:45.6606110Z [36;1m  local month=$1[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6606349Z [36;1m  local day=$2[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6606573Z [36;1m  [0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6606849Z [36;1m  # BST runs from last Sunday in March to last Sunday in October[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6607253Z [36;1m  if [[ $month -lt 3 || $month -gt 10 ]]; then[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6607548Z [36;1m    return 1  # GMT (winter)[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6607849Z [36;1m  elif [[ $month -gt 3 && $month -lt 10 ]]; then[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6608148Z [36;1m    return 0  # BST (summer)[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6608417Z [36;1m  elif [[ $month -eq 3 ]]; then[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6608731Z [36;1m    # March - need to check if we're past last Sunday[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6609103Z [36;1m    local last_sunday=$(date -d "$CURRENT_YEAR-03-31" +%u)[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6609480Z [36;1m    local last_sunday_date=$((31 - last_sunday + 1))[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6609845Z [36;1m    [[ $day -ge $last_sunday_date ]] && return 0 || return 1[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6610168Z [36;1m  elif [[ $month -eq 10 ]]; then[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6610488Z [36;1m    # October - need to check if we're before last Sunday[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6610868Z [36;1m    local last_sunday=$(date -d "$CURRENT_YEAR-10-31" +%u)[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6611235Z [36;1m    local last_sunday_date=$((31 - last_sunday + 1))[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6611588Z [36;1m    [[ $day -lt $last_sunday_date ]] && return 0 || return 1[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6611896Z [36;1m  fi[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6612100Z [36;1m}[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6612294Z [36;1m[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6612535Z [36;1m# Check if this is a Wednesday sales prep run[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6612901Z [36;1mif [[ "$CURRENT_DAY" == "3" && "$CURRENT_MINUTE" == "05" ]]; then[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6613247Z [36;1m  # Determine current British timezone[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6613575Z [36;1m  if is_bst $CURRENT_MONTH $CURRENT_DATE; then[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6613898Z [36;1m    # BST active: 9 UTC = 10 AM British Time[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6614207Z [36;1m    if [[ "$CURRENT_HOUR" == "09" ]]; then[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6614671Z [36;1m      echo "🎯 Wednesday 10am BST Sales Prep Run Detected"[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6615080Z [36;1m      echo "mode=SECONDARY_SYNC_ONLY" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6615520Z [36;1m      echo "description=Sales Prep: Secondary Sync Only (BST)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6615904Z [36;1m      exit 0[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6616121Z [36;1m    fi[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6616321Z [36;1m  else[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6616561Z [36;1m    # GMT active: 10 UTC = 10 AM British Time  [0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6616876Z [36;1m    if [[ "$CURRENT_HOUR" == "10" ]]; then[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6617225Z [36;1m      echo "🎯 Wednesday 10am GMT Sales Prep Run Detected"[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6617596Z [36;1m      echo "mode=SECONDARY_SYNC_ONLY" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6618187Z [36;1m      echo "description=Sales Prep: Secondary Sync Only (GMT)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6618566Z [36;1m      exit 0[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6618784Z [36;1m    fi[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6618999Z [36;1m  fi[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6619225Z [36;1m  [0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6619676Z [36;1m  # If we get here, it's Wednesday but wrong time - skip this run[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6620168Z [36;1m  echo "⏭️ Wednesday detected but not the correct British time - skipping"[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6620601Z [36;1m  echo "mode=SKIP" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6621011Z [36;1m  echo "description=Skipped - Wrong British Time" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6621392Z [36;1melse[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6621662Z [36;1m  echo "🔄 Regular Bidirectional Sync Run"[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6622032Z [36;1m  echo "mode=BIDIRECTIONAL_SYNC" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6622447Z [36;1m  echo "description=Full Bidirectional Sync" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT[0m
2025-10-03T15:47:45.6622827Z [36;1mfi[0m
